role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of visible text and remained within the domain of script/language analysis.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and climate cues without drifting into unrelated domains.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed specific plant species (spruce, birch, dandelions) and their biogeographical relevance.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated road signs, curbing, and infrastructure standards consistent with the domain.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized architectural and infrastructural cues (siding, fencing, lamp design) to distinguish the region.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline executed flawlessly. All agents adhered to their roles, provided grounded evidence, and the tournament correctly identified Norway as the winner by leveraging the specific regulatory and architectural evidence provided by the specialists.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Accurately noted the lack of text.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of terrain and vegetation match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Identified plants visible in the image (dandelions, spruce, birch).
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Correctly described the pedestrian sign and curb style.
